description: Style Note jealous 21 stays in-vogue with this stylish piece that is sure to become a love-forever favourite in your casual wardrobe. Wear it with form fitting denims, style with understated accessories and peep-toe shoes. Product Details Pink round neck top that has smocking around the neckline, short puffed sleeves that have smocking on the cuffs, mock buttoned placket on the chest, a bow below the left shoulder and an elasticated hem Material and Care 100% viscose Machine wash delicate in cold water with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach, scrub, wring, tumble dry or dry clean Dry flat in shade Warm iron; do not iron on decorations Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height:5'8" and chest:33") is wearing a size M
